pom.xml.general_idea: Rename the project artifact and name from 'kitchensink' to 'courses' to reflect the new application identity.
Add Spring Data MongoDB starter to enable MongoDB database integration.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency, likely to manage validation API availability in the new stack.
Add Awaitility library to assist with testing asynchronous jobs.
Add spring-security-config dependency to manage security context in async threads.
Add OpenCSV library for CSV processing capabilities.
Update JaCoCo exclusion patterns to match the new package structure (courses instead of kitchensink).
Add a JaCoCo check execution with strict coverage rules (100% instruction/branch/line coverage).
Add Pitest Maven plugin for mutation testing with JUnit 5 support.
Add git-code-format-maven-plugin to enforce code formatting using Google Java Format.
Add git-commit-id-maven-plugin to generate git properties during build.
Upgrade the Node.js version used by the frontend build plugin from v12 to v16.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add MONGODB_URI placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add START_QTR placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add END_QTR placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add UCSB_API_KEY placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add COURSE_DATA_STALE_THRESHOLD_MINUTES placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN placeholder to environment configuration sample for Storybook integration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.
Add frontend/strykerTmp to .gitignore to exclude Stryker mutation testing temporary files.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Set the PRODUCTION environment variable to true to configure the application for production mode.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project from 'demo-spring-react-kitchensink' to 'proj-courses' and update the description to reflect the CMPSC 156 legacy code project.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title to '# proj-courses' and updated intro text to describe 'Courses Search'.

README.md.general_idea: Replace old Storybook and Heroku deployment links with new Dokku production and QA links for the current and previous semester teams.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced Storybook links with a table of Dokku URLs for prod/qa and W24 teams.

README.md.general_idea: Simplify the OAuth setup instructions by referencing a dedicated documentation file instead of inline steps.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced detailed Google Console steps with a link to `docs/oauth.md` and an error screenshot.

README.md.general_idea: Clarify the local development setup instructions with code blocks and troubleshooting tips for frontend/backend synchronization.
README.md.human_impl: Added code blocks for `mvn spring-boot:run` and `npm start`, plus notes on blank pages and frontend connection errors.

README.md.general_idea: Add specific instructions for deploying and configuring the application on Dokku, including environment variables.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '# Getting Started on Dokku' with `dokku config:set` commands and `PRODUCTION` variable notes.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to access the Swagger UI for API endpoints.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '# Accessing swagger' with the localhost URL.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to access the H2 database console locally and on Dokku.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '# Accessing Database Console' with links to localhost and Dokku docs.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to run partial and full Pitest mutation coverage tests.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '## Partial pitest runs' with `mvn pitest:mutationCoverage` examples.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect a change in project identity or purpose.

frontend/.eslintrc.json.general_idea: Added 'react-app/jest' to the extends array to enable Jest-specific linting rules provided by Create React App.
Disabled the 'testing-library/no-node-access' rule to allow direct DOM node access in tests.

frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Add storybook log files to the gitignore to prevent committing debug output.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Converted Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern tooling standards.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.human_impl: Changed 'module.exports = {...}' to 'const config = {...}; export default config;'

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Updated glob patterns for story files to match Storybook 8 conventions, removing explicit .mdx pattern in favor of generic .mdx and adding .mjs support.
Added the new Storybook onboarding addon to the configuration.
Added the Chromatic visual testing addon to the configuration.
Added the interactions addon for testing user interactions in stories.
Added the remix-react-router addon to support React Router v6+ in stories.
Added the queryparams addon to manage URL query parameters in stories.
Explicitly defined the framework configuration object for react-webpack5, replacing implicit detection.
Configured static directories to serve public assets in Storybook.
Removed the custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or deprecation in the new setup.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Integrate msw-storybook-addon to enable API mocking in Storybook stories.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: import { initialize, mswLoader } from 'msw-storybook-addon'; initialize(); loaders: [mswLoader]

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add react-toastify imports and ToastContainer to the preview configuration to support toast notifications in stories.
Refactor decorators to conditionally apply MemoryRouter and show navigation toasts, allowing stories to override routing behavior.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: decorators: [(Story, Context) => { if (Context.args?.suppressMemoryRouter) ... else ... useLocation ... toast ... }]

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Update Storybook preview parameters to use the modern controls matchers syntax and export the preview object explicitly.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: const preview = { parameters: { controls: { matchers: { ... } } } }; export default preview;

frontend/README.md.general_idea: Replace generic Create React App boilerplate documentation with project-specific commands and directory structure explanations.
frontend/README.md.human_impl: Replaced '# Getting Started with Create React App' and 'Available Scripts' with custom tables for 'Commands' and 'Directory structures'.

frontend/README.md.general_idea: Remove outdated links to external Create React App documentation that are no longer relevant or necessary.
frontend/README.md.human_impl: Deleted sections linking to 'Code Splitting', 'Analyzing the Bundle Size', 'Making a Progressive Web App', 'Advanced Configuration', 'Deployment', and 'npm run build fails to minify'.

Add yoctocolors 2.1.1 and yoctocolors-cjs 2.1.2 for terminal color support in dev tools.
Update package-lock.json structure to include license fields and node_modules paths for better dependency tracking.
